rationale: Section 47.003 permits fund appropriations for tier one allotments under Chapter 48, which is the mechanism that compensates districts for revenue lost to an increased homestead exemption. No direct conflict.
quote:
money in the fund may be appropriated only:
(1) to pay the cost of tier one allotments under Chapter 48; or
(2) for the purpose of reducing school district maintenance and operations ad valorem tax rates.
_note: No direct conflict; increased exemption raises tier one allotment costs but remains within permitted uses of the fund.
